Notes:
TBD - To be determined
Renewable Energy (RE) Projects (Geothermal, Hydro, Biomass, Solar, and Wind) are updated as of 31 December 2025
IRESS - Integrated Renewable Energy and Energy Storage System

For inquiries, please contact the following:
DOE Electric Power Industry Management Bureau (EPIMB) for non-RE projects (coal, oil, natural gas,and BESS) - doe.epimb.powerprojects@gmail.com
DOE Renewable Energy Management Bureau (REMB) for RE Projects - remb9513@doe.gov.ph
